query: risotto alla Milanese saffron risotto with parmesan and butter

draft.title: Saffron Risotto
draft.description: Classic Italian risotto alla Milanese with fragrant saffron, creamy parmesan, and butter, perfect for a rich and savory meal.

steps.text: Heat the chicken stock in a saucepan and keep it hot on low heat.
In a large pan, heat olive oil and half the butter over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the arborio rice to the pan and stir for 2 minutes until the rice is well coated and slightly toasted.
Pour in the white wine and cook, stirring, until it has mostly evaporated.
Add the saffron threads soaked in a small amount of warm stock to the rice.
Begin adding the hot stock one ladle at a time, stirring frequently and allowing the liquid to absorb before adding more.
Continue this process for about 18-20 minutes until the rice is creamy and al dente.
Remove the pan from heat, stir in the remaining butter and grated parmesan cheese. Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
Cover the risotto for 2 minutes, then serve immediately.
